description:
Offered: Offered every semester.
This course provides private study of piano that includes the development of technique, repertoire, and performance practice related to piano performance. These lessons occur in a one-on-one studio setting and are scheduled by the student in conjunction with the Humanities Department and the applied music instructor. A jury performance is required and opportunities for student recital performance may be available. Seven hours of individual instruction per semester.
Note: May be repeated for a maximum of two credits.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): FA
